news.title: Oil falls, Asian stocks climb on hopes of US-Iran Hormuz deal
news.summary: Oil prices fell and Asian stocks climbed on Monday over hopes a deal between the United States and Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz could be brokered.But sticking points in their negotiations have tempered hopes of a swift resolution to restore the transit of oil and gas through the Strait of Hormuz.

news.title: Asian shares mostly gain and oil prices fall after Trump says peace talks on Iran war are proceeding
news.summary: Asian shares mostly rose Monday and oil prices plunged after U.S. President Donald Trump said talks on ending the war with Iran are progressing.  Japan's benchmark Nikkei 225 surged 3.1% in morning trading to 65,321.56.  Trump said negotiations with Iran were “proceeding in an orderly and constructive manner.”

news.title: Indian shares to open higher on US-Iran peace deal optimism
news.summary: May 25 (Reuters) - Indian shares are set to open higher on Monday, as crude oil prices fall below $100 per barrel for the first time in more than two weeks on prospects of a deal to end the Iran war.
